basics.title: Let's set up the basics
basics.subtitle: Two quick things so NutricIA feels like yours. You can change everything later in Settings.
basics.calorieHint: Unsure? Leave the default — you can tune it anytime.

preferences.title: Any dietary preferences?
preferences.subtitle: Pick what applies. This helps tailor recipe suggestions. Optional.
preferences.notificationsHint: Gentle nudges to log meals and water
preferences.footnote: You can add more dietary tags, change theme, and configure everything from Settings.

slide1.title:
AI-Powered
Food Scanner
slide1.subtitle: Just point your camera at any meal and our AI instantly analyzes calories, macros and nutrients.
slide1.feature1: Snap a photo — instant nutrition breakdown
slide1.feature2: Protein, Carbs, Fat & Fiber in seconds
slide1.feature3: Works with any food, homemade or restaurant

slide2.title:
Your Daily
Nourishment Journal
slide2.subtitle: Track every meal with beautiful daily timelines. See your breakfast, lunch, snacks & dinner at a glance.
slide2.feature1: Organized by meal type — Breakfast to Dinner
slide2.feature2: Daily calorie & macro totals updated live
slide2.feature3: Swipe between days to review past meals

slide3.title:
Grow Your
Habit Garden
slide3.subtitle: Turn healthy habits into plants! Each habit becomes a virtual plant that grows with your consistency.
slide3.feature1: Plants grow healthier as your streak increases
slide3.feature2: Neglected habits wilt — revive them with check-ins
slide3.feature3: Track hydration with the water cup tracker

slide4.title:
Mindful Tracking,
Not Obsessive
slide4.subtitle: NutricIA is designed around nourishment, not restriction. Gentle insights, not guilt trips.
slide4.feature1: Beautiful nourishment ring — not a calorie alarm
slide4.feature2: Personalized goals that adapt to you
